content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta excluding `.ralph-burning/`. Ran `nix develop -c cargo test pr_watch`, `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings`, `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check`, and `nix build`; the commands passed. Found three fix-current-bead issues.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:265 and src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:504 merge whatever PR head is current when `gh pr merge` runs, even though CI, bot reaction, and line comments were checked against the earlier `PrStatusSnapshot.head_sha`. A push between the poll and merge can be merged without the watcher having observed CI/bot approval for that head. Thread the observed head SHA into `merge_pr` and use `gh pr merge --match-head-commit <head_sha>` or abort when no head SHA is available.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This closes a real auto-merge race where the command can merge unreviewed or unchecked code.
2. src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:429 fills `latest_push_at` from the latest commit's `committedDate`, and src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:783 then filters bot comments using that value as if it were the most recent push time. Commit time can predate a delayed push or preserved-date head update, so stale bot comments from before the current push can be surfaced as current findings and block the success path. Use an actual PR head-update/push timestamp, or fall back to head-SHA filtering when only commit dates are available.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The bead explicitly requires line comments since the most recent push; commit time is not equivalent to push time.
3. src/cli/pr.rs:43 accepts `--poll-interval 0`, which becomes `Duration::from_secs(0)` at src/cli/pr.rs:92; src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:312 then performs zero-duration sleeps and loops through `gh` status/reaction/comment calls as fast as possible until `max_wait`. Reject zero poll intervals at CLI or request validation.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: A single bad argument can hammer GitHub and the local machine for the full watch window.
